mapper.select: SELECT MENUCD, PAR_MENUCD, MENUNM, CLASS_PATH, ORD, SEARCH, REGEDIT, USE_YN FROM TBL_COM_MENU ORDER BY ISNULL(PAR_MENUCD, MENUCD) ASC, PAR_MENUCD ASC, ORD ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_COM_MENU ( MENUCD, PAR_MENUCD, MENUNM, CLASS_PATH, ORD, SEARCH, REGEDIT, USE_YN, REGDTM ) VALUES ( #{MENUCD}, #{PAR_MENUCD}, #{MENUNM}, #{CLASS_PATH}, #{ORD}, #{SEARCH}, #{REGEDIT}, #{USE_YN}, GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_COM_MENU SET PAR_MENUCD = #{PAR_MENUCD}, MENUNM = #{MENUNM}, CLASS_PATH = #{CLASS_PATH}, ORD = #{ORD}, SEARCH = #{SEARCH}, REGEDIT = #{REGEDIT}, USE_YN = #{USE_YN}, EDITDTM = GETDATE() WHERE MENUCD = #{MENUCD}
